description: Plan-view fab yard radiography shot: exposure device + crank stub with source point center-left, pipe weld target. Open shot sprays omnidirectional rays to a dashed 110 m boundary tagged 2 mR/h; collimator snaps on (RATE ÷10 chip), rays dim and one narrow cone draws onto the pipe weld; boundary collapses (inward arrows) to a solid cyan 35 m circle, 2 mR/h tag riding the new edge; survey meter needle settles on 2 mR/h and rope stanchions post the 35 m line.
